webfinger.detail: Covered by the ActivityPub and federation-matrix Rust conformance gates.

actor.detail: Actor shape, locked posture, and publicKey covered by conformance.

follow.detail: Live Mastodon follow flow covered by toot smoke path.

accept.detail: Approved followers receive signed Accept delivery.

create.detail: Followers-only and public Create delivery covered by live smoke path.

update.detail: Core inbox regressions cover Mastodon-style Update(Note) and Update(Question) modifying stored timeline rows.

delete.detail: Core inbox regression covers Mastodon-style Delete(Note) removing stored timeline rows.

reply.detail: Covered by the live toot inbound reply smoke gate, owner post-detail assertion, and followed-actor reply timeline regression.

like.detail: Covered by the live toot favourite smoke gate and owner post-detail assertion.

announce.detail: Covered by core inbox Announce/Undo regression tests for Mastodon-style boosts.

undo.detail: Core inbox regression covers Undo of Like and Announce interactions.

idempotency.detail: Follower and following writes use conflict-safe upserts; inbox interaction regressions verify stable object state after Undo cleanup.

content_shape.detail: ActivityPub conformance, Mastodon API conformance, and core inbox regressions cover Note basics, replies/likes/shares, media attachments, mentions, hashtags, and Question/poll rendering and ingestion.

authorized_fetch.detail: Anonymous private object denial and signed-fetch helper covered by conformance.

follower_synchronization.detail: MASTODON-SYNC-01 covers signed partial follower synchronization collection fetches for followers-only delivery support.

private_visibility.detail: Anonymous outbox/object checks prevent private and E2EE leakage.

webfinger.detail: Run federation-matrix with DAIS_FEDERATION_TARGETS containing a Pleroma/Akkoma account.

actor.detail: Remote actor shape is probed when actor URL is configured.

follow.detail: Run from a local/tunnel Pleroma account and verify pending follower row.

accept.detail: Approve from dais CLI/TUI and verify remote follow state.

create.detail: Deliver public and followers-only Create to approved Pleroma follower.

update.detail: Update a Pleroma-visible Note and verify the remote timeline/rendered object changes.

delete.detail: Delete a Pleroma-visible Note and verify the remote tombstone/delete state.

reply.detail: Reply from Pleroma and verify inbox ingestion.

like.detail: Favourite from Pleroma and verify Like ingestion.

announce.detail: Repeat from Pleroma and verify Announce ingestion.

undo.detail: Undo a Pleroma favourite/announce and verify local interaction cleanup.

idempotency.detail: Replay duplicate Pleroma activities and verify local rows remain idempotent.

content_shape.detail: Verify Pleroma rendering for mentions, hashtags, media attachments, and Question/poll objects.

authorized_fetch.detail: Verify followers-only dereference from approved actor and anonymous denial.

follower_synchronization.detail: If the target supports Mastodon-compatible followers-only sync, verify Collection-Synchronization delivery headers and signed partial collection fetches.

private_visibility.detail: Dais-side anonymous privacy gate is server-independent.

webfinger.detail: Run federation-matrix with DAIS_FEDERATION_TARGETS containing a Misskey account.

actor.detail: Remote actor shape is probed when actor URL is configured.

follow.detail: Follow from Misskey and verify dais pending follower row.

accept.detail: Approve from dais and verify Misskey follow state.

create.detail: Deliver Create and inspect Misskey timeline rendering.

update.detail: Update a Misskey-visible Note and verify rendered object/timeline changes.

delete.detail: Delete a Misskey-visible Note and verify remote deletion/tombstone behavior.

reply.detail: Reply from Misskey and verify inbox ingestion.

like.detail: React/like from Misskey and verify compatible ActivityPub ingestion.

announce.detail: Renote from Misskey and verify Announce-compatible ingestion.

undo.detail: Undo Misskey reaction/renote activity where exposed and verify local cleanup.

idempotency.detail: Replay duplicate Misskey activities and verify local rows remain idempotent.

content_shape.detail: Verify Misskey rendering for mentions, hashtags, media attachments, polls, and quote-related extensions where present.

authorized_fetch.detail: Verify followers-only object access with signed fetch where Misskey supports it.

follower_synchronization.detail: Verify whether Misskey-compatible targets consume Mastodon Collection-Synchronization headers or ignore them safely.

private_visibility.detail: Dais-side anonymous privacy gate is server-independent.

webfinger.detail: Run federation-matrix with DAIS_FEDERATION_TARGETS containing a Pixelfed account.

actor.detail: Remote actor shape is probed when actor URL is configured.

follow.detail: Follow from Pixelfed and verify dais pending follower row.

accept.detail: Approve from dais and verify Pixelfed follow state.

create.detail: Deliver Note fallback; media-specific rendering belongs to later media work.

update.detail: Update a Pixelfed-visible Note/media post and verify rendered object changes where supported.

delete.detail: Delete a Pixelfed-visible Note/media post and verify remote deletion behavior.

reply.detail: Reply/comment from Pixelfed and verify inbox ingestion.

like.detail: Like from Pixelfed and verify Like ingestion.

announce.detail: Pixelfed boost/share behavior varies; record observed behavior as compatibility data.

undo.detail: Undo Pixelfed like/share behavior where exposed and verify local cleanup.

idempotency.detail: Replay duplicate Pixelfed activities and verify local rows remain idempotent.

content_shape.detail: Verify Pixelfed rendering for image/video attachments, captions, mentions, hashtags, and Note fallback behavior.

authorized_fetch.detail: Verify followers-only object access where Pixelfed supports signed fetch.

follower_synchronization.detail: Verify whether Pixelfed-compatible targets consume Mastodon Collection-Synchronization headers or ignore them safely.

private_visibility.detail: Dais-side anonymous privacy gate is server-independent.
